Payment by Wire Transfer:
Intermediary Bank: National Westminster Bank PLC, London Intermediary Bank SWIFT BIC: NWBKGB2L Account # with Intermediary Bank: IBAN - GB52NWBK60000410017267
Beneficiary’s Bank: Wells Fargo Bank, NA Beneficiary’s Bank SWIFT BIC: WFBIUS6A Beneficiary’s Bank Address: 1525 West WT Harris Blvd, Floor 3, Charlotte, NC 28262, U.S.A. Beneficiary’s Account Number: 3330003547 Beneficiary’s Name: Integration Appliance, Inc. Beneficiary’s Address: 3101 Park Blvd, Palo Alto, CA 94306, United States of America
Please note that this is a GBP account ONLY and both intermediary and beneficiary account details are required for payment. (GBP)
